nodes.name: 马达加斯加海雕
nodes.summary: 马达加斯加海雕（Madagascar fish eagle，学名 Icthyophaga vociferoides），在图谱中标记为极危（CR）物种，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: CR
nodes.summary: CR表示 IUCN 极危等级，当前关联174种鸟类，如勺嘴鹬、加州神鹫、菲律宾鹰等174种鸟类。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The Madagascar fish eagle has been suffering from a declining population and is threatened by habitat destruction and persecution, and the International Union for Conservation of Nature has rated its conservation status as being "critically endangered"

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Surveys between 2005 and 2006 recorded at least 240 adults (287 total individuals), with an estimated 120 breeding pairs. The main threats to its breeding habitat are deforestation, soil erosion and the development of wetland areas for rice paddies
